# Cultivating Clarity

> A book about the art of discerning what matters using contextual intelligence by Ian Pilon

Cultivating Clarity explores how to cut through noise and complexity to focus on what truly matters. The book introduces contextual intelligence as a framework for better decision-making in business and life.

## About the Book
- [Home](https://minimalissimo.replit.app/): Overview of the book, author, and key concepts

## Free Resources
- [Context Mapping Blueprint](https://minimalissimo.replit.app/#context-mapping): Downloadable PDF tool for mapping context in decision-making

## Author
Ian Pilon - Author and expert in contextual intelligence and strategic clarity
